log: Fixed Google Photos spoofing
Added hide screen capture status feature
Unlocked Pixel 3 exclusive wallpaper
Improvement of flashlight strength control UX
Option to hide ADB and Developer setting status
Various under-the-hood bug fixes and optimizations
Initial Android 16 QPR2 release
Added build flag option to switch between Pixel Launcher and Launcher3
Fully rebased Launcher3
Updated recovery images
Added roaming indicator support to statusbar tuner
Introduced VoLTE, VoWiFi, HD, and Wi-Fi Calling status bar icons
Added toggle to disable the 'Data Disabled' indicator icon
Added option to display 4G icon instead of LTE
Added double-tap gesture to trigger Doze mode
Added Auto-Brightness toggle in the brightness slider
Added brightness slider position and shape customization
Added QS tile shape customization support
Added support for Advanced Restart options
Added override for Mock Location restrictions feature
Added edge-to-edge fullscreen display controller feature
Added Wi-Fi and Cellular Quick Settings tiles
Added Ringer, Sound Mode, and Volume Quick Settings tiles
Added Flashlight Strength control
Added per-subscription Force LTE-CA (Carrier Aggregation) override support
Various under-the-hood bug fixes and optimizations
Android 16 QPR1 December Update (v3.5)
Redesigned Settings UI
Introduced Force LTE_CA override per subscription
Applied rounded corners across the entire UI
Added pure Black theme option for Dark Mode
Added double-tap gesture on screen to sleep
Fixed long-press Power button to toggle torch
That wraps up QPR1! See you next month with QPR2 or hopefully even sooner, within the next two weeks
More optimizations and under-the-hood fixes
Initial Android 16 QPR1 November update (v3.4)
Switched to pixel launcher temporarily
Android 16 October update (v3.3)
Updated new bootanimation (credit - Sreejith)
Enabled force monochrome icons
Added AOD on charge
Implemented new flash light strength control
Added new edge to edge fullscreen display feature
Added new fonts,iconpacks and app icons shapes customisation
Various under-the-hood bug fixes and optimizations
Android 16 September update (v3.2)
AIDL: Initial LiveDisplay sysfs AIDL implementation
Added auto-brightness toggle to the new Compose QS brightness slider
Added GameSpace (because apparently gaming is life)
Implemented click-to-take partial screenshot feature
Moved 4G, Data Disabled, and Wi-Fi standard icons to Statusbar Tuner
Added toggle for privacy indicators
Various under-the-hood bug fixes and optimizations
Redesigned Settings UI.
System wide UI related changes.
Optimized and Improved Launcher.
Added window level blur support.
Added dimming the wallpaper with night features.
Redesigned UDFPS icon
Initial Android 16 June Update.
All previous features retained.
New Quick Settings panel added.
Added blur effects on settings search bar
Smoother animations throughout the UI
A15 QPR2 June Patch Update.
Added Quick Tap Service.
Implemented Keybox Spoofing.
That’s a wrap for Android 15! See you next month as we dive into Android 16.
A15 QPR2 May Patch Update.
Improved charging control with optimizations for better battery management.
Added Wi-Fi standard indicator in the status bar.
Enabled default font configuration system-wide.
Restored animations during Lock/Unlock
Added app downgrade support
Added toggle to hide screen capture status from apps
Option to hide ADB and developer setting status
Added AMOLED-themed icon effects
A15 QPR2 April Patch Update.
Fixed Multiple NPE problems.
Brought back smartspace start paddings to what they were before.
Used Accent colors for privacy indicators.
Added Multiple Screenrecord options
Added App Cloning Feature
Initial QPR2 March 2025 Update.
Retained the majority of features from the previous update.
Added support for Touch Gestures.
Expanded ambient settings, providing additional customization options.
Integrated support for the Flashlight Strength Quick Settings Tile
Added High Touch Polling Rate support, improving touch responsiveness
